records.description: Invalid Cargo.toml — check TOML syntax and required sections

stderr_regex: failed to parse manifest.*Cargo\.toml|no `package` section found|TOML parse error

shortest_verification.command: bash -c 'echo "error: failed to parse manifest at /home/user/project/Cargo.toml" >&2; echo "Caused by: no package section found" >&2; exit 1'

fix_path.description: Invalid Cargo.toml — check TOML syntax and required sections

legacy_v3.stderr_pattern: failed to parse manifest.*Cargo\.toml|no `package` section found|TOML parse error
legacy_v3.description: Invalid Cargo.toml — check TOML syntax and required sections

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "error: failed to parse manifest at /home/user/project/Cargo.toml" >&2; echo "Caused by: no package section found" >&2; exit 1'
